stories.title: MLB Draft Day — White Sox on the Clock NOW

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 MLB Draft is TODAY.

White Sox pick No. 1 at 1 PM ET on Peacock — first time the Sox hold No. 1 since 1977.

3 finalists: Roch Cholowsky (UCLA SS), Grady Emerson (HS SS), Vahn Lackey (GT C).

No leaked signal. Coin flip. #MLBDraft

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
White Sox take Roch Cholowsky No. 1 overall in the 2026 MLB Draft.

The UCLA SS is the first college shortstop drafted No. 1 since Dansby Swanson in 2015.

52 HRs. More walks than strikeouts at UCLA. The rebuild starts here.

#MLBDraft #WhiteSox

article.headline: MLB Draft Day 2026 — White Sox Select With the No. 1 Pick for the First Time Since 1977

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
MLB Draft Day — White Sox on the Clock NOW

research.facts:
MLB Draft Day — White Sox on the Clock NOW
**Source(s):**
- mlb.com/draft/2026/order
- mlb.com/news/2026-mlb-draft-overview-and-schedule
- cbssports.com/mlb/news/2026-mlb-mock-draft-complete-first-round-projection-july-10/
- espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49315943/2026-mlb-mock-draft-final-predictions-first-two-rounds-white-sox-no-1-cholowsky-emerson-lackey
- axios.com/local/chicago/2026/07/08/white-sox-no-1-pick-2026-mlb-draft-cholowsky-grady-emerson-vahn-lackey
- yahoo sports: White Sox locked in on 3 options
**Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Draft is today, July 11, at the Pennsylvania Convention Center in Philadelphia
- Picks 1-10 at 1:00 PM ET on NBC/Peacock; Picks 11-40 on MLB Network; Picks 41-135 on MLB.com
- White Sox hold No. 1 pick — first No. 1 pick since Harold Baines in 1977
- Three confirmed finalists: Roch Cholowsky (SS, UCLA), Grady Emerson (SS, Fort Worth Christian HS TX), Vahn Lackey (C, Georgia Tech)
- White Sox VP Mike Shirley: all three are "real and happening up to the minute"
- Cholowsky: .329/.448/.624, 52 HR in three years at UCLA; 105 walks vs. 100 Ks
- Emerson: ranked No. 1 by MLB.com heading into draft week; 2026 Gatorade Baseball Player of the Year; committed to Texas but draft-eligible
- Lackey: hit .397 with 20 HR in 2026 at Georgia Tech; reportedly the preference of some front office voices
- CBS Sports final mock (July 10): Cholowsky at No. 1
- ESPN's McDaniel and Rogers final picks: Cholowsky No. 1
- ML Pipeline Mayo: Cholowsky 50%, Emerson 45%, Lackey wild card
- If Cholowsky selected: 3rd college SS ever No. 1 overall (after Bill Almon 1974, Dansby Swanson 2015)
**Confirmed Facts (LOW confidence):**
- Actual No. 1 pick result: not yet indexed as of research. Draft starts 1 PM ET today.
- NOTE: The actual pick will need to be confirmed via live tracker before writing Story 1 Post 2 (1:30 PM tweet)

stories.title: Home Run Derby Full Field Set — Murakami Completes the Bracket

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The 2026 Home Run Derby field is complete. 🚀

Harper, Schwarber, Caglianone, Caminero, Contreras, Murakami, Rice, Walker.

Murakami is the final addition — back from injury, becomes just the 2nd Japanese-born Derby participant ever.

Monday. Netflix. 8 PM ET. #HomeRunDerby

article.headline: 2026 Home Run Derby Field Is Complete — Murakami's Return Makes It Must-Watch

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Home Run Derby Full Field Set

#### Image Concept 2A — Full Field Graphic / Article Hero + FB Long-Form

**Concept:** 8-player bracket-style graphic. All 8 participants listed in two columns of 4, with team logos or flags. "FULL FIELD SET" headline at top. Netflix + Citizens Bank Park + Monday July 13 8PM ET at bottom. Clean, high-energy design.

**Imagn Search Terms:**
- `Bryce Harper Philadelphia Phillies`
- `Munetaka Murakami Chicago White Sox`

**Canva Direction:** Red/gold All-Star Week palette, 8-player two-column grid, each with player name + team, "2026 T-Mobile Home Run Derby" headline, Netflix logo/CTA, event details footer

---

#### Image Concept 2B — Murakami Spotlight / FB Caption

research.facts:
Home Run Derby Full Field Set
**Source(s):**
- mlb.com/news/2026-mlb-home-run-derby-participants
- bleacherreport.com/articles/25453449-white-soxs-munetaka-murakami-announced-2026-mlb-hr-derby-full-field-participants-revealed
- mlb.com/news/kyle-schwarber-joins-2026-home-run-derby
- mlb.com/news/munetaka-murakami-joins-2026-home-run-derby
- espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49326376/phillies-kyle-schwarber-joins-home-run-derby-one-slot-left
- espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49239710/mlb-2026-all-star-home-run-derby-bracket-analysis-participants
- NBC Sports: format rules confirmation
**Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Event: Monday, July 13, 8 PM ET, Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia, on Netflix
- Full 8-man field confirmed:
1. Bryce Harper (Philadelphia Phillies) — 2018 Derby champ competing in his home park
2. Kyle Schwarber (Philadelphia Phillies) — MLB HR leader, 32 HRs; third Derby appearance
3. Jac Caglianone (Kansas City Royals)
4. Junior Caminero (Tampa Bay Rays) — 2025 Derby runner-up
5. Willson Contreras (Boston Red Sox)
6. Munetaka Murakami (Chicago White Sox) — final spot announced; missed 1+ month with strained right hamstring; returned Friday; 20 HR in 2026; second Japanese-born Derby participant ever (after Ohtani 2021)
7. Ben Rice (New York Yankees)
8. Jordan Walker (St. Louis Cardinals)
- Format change confirmed: MLB reverted from timer to swing-based. Round 1: 20 swings. Round 2: 15 swings. Final: 15 swings. If the final swing of a round is a HR, batter continues until they don't homer.
- Shohei Ohtani OUT — withdrew citing left knee irritation; he was a 2021 Derby participant
- Murakami was also named as an All-Star injury replacement on the same day he was added to the Derby field

stories.title: HBCU Swingman Classic Recap — AL 6, NL 1, Radcliffe MVP

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
AL 6, NL 1 at Citizens Bank Park last night.

Jacoby Radcliffe (Southern University) won MVP. Ken Griffey Jr. presented the trophy.

Jimmy Rollins managed the NL. Rickie Weeks managed the AL. 17,000 fans.

The 4th Annual HBCU Swingman Classic didn't disappoint. #HBCU #AllStarWeek

article.headline: AL Wins 4th Annual HBCU Swingman Classic 6-1 — Radcliffe Takes MVP, Griffey Presents Trophy

research.facts:
HBCU Swingman Classic Recap
**Source(s):**
- mlb.com/news/american-league-wins-2026-hbcu-swingman-classic-in-philadelphia
- si.com/college/hbcu/baseball/hbcu-swingman-classic-american-league-defeats-national-league
- inquirer.com/phillies/hbcu-swingman-classic-santino-harwood-jimmy-rollins-ken-griffey-20260711.html
- facebook.com/MLBNetwork/posts (broadcast confirmation)
**Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Result: American League 6, National League 1
- Date: Friday, July 10, 2026, Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia
- Broadcast: MLB Network at 7 PM ET
- Attendance: approximately 17,000 fans
- 4th Annual HBCU Swingman Classic (official All-Star Week event)
- MVP: Jacoby Radcliffe, CF, Southern University — scored a run, stole two bases, hit by pitch
- Ken Griffey Jr. personally presented the MVP trophy to Radcliffe
- AL Manager: Rickie Weeks (14-year MLB veteran, HBCU alumnus)
- NL Manager: Jimmy Rollins (Phillies legend, 2007 NL MVP)
- AL opened with a three-run first inning
- Santino Harwood mentioned as a notable player in Inquirer headline (position/school unconfirmed from available text)
**Confirmed Facts (MEDIUM confidence):**
- Full box score with per-player stats beyond Radcliffe not retrieved

stories.title: All-Star Week Storylines — Trout's 12th, Ohtani Out, Phillies Lead with 6

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
5 All-Star storylines for Tuesday night:

1. Trout's 12th selection — 40 miles from his hometown
2. Ohtani is OUT (left knee)
3. Phillies send 6 All-Stars — most in MLB
4. Verlander's farewell
5. First All-Star Game in Philly since 1996

July 14. 8 PM. FOX. #AllStarWeek #MLB

research.facts:
All-Star Week Storylines
**Source(s):**
- mlb.com/news/2026-mlb-all-star-game-rosters-announcement
- mlb.com/news/2026-all-star-game-rosters
- cbsnews.com/losangeles/news/5-dodgers-including-ohtani-and-freeman-named-to-all-star-game-angels-mike-trout-selected-for-12th-time/
- mlb.com/news/phillies-to-have-5-representatives-as-all-star-game-hosts (note: later corrected to 6 with Luzardo replacement)
- philliesnation.com/2026/07/philadelphia-phillies-jesus-luzardo-mlb-all-star-game-selection-july-7-2-26/
- mlbtraderumors.com/2026/07/shohei-ohtani-to-miss-start-skip-all-star-game-due-to-left-knee-issue.html
- mlb.com/news/justin-verlander-legacy-all-star
- bleacherreport.com/articles/25453376-aaron-judge-ranger-suarezs-al-roster-replacements-named-ahead-2026-mlb-all-star-game
**Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- All-Star Game: Tuesday July 14, 8 PM ET, Citizens Bank Park, FOX
- Mike Trout: 12th All-Star selection, 11th as a starter (third AL player with 11+ starter nods, after Cal Ripken Jr. 17, George Brett 11); healthy in 2026 (14 HR, .897 OPS in 61 games); 40 miles from his Millville, NJ hometown
- Shohei Ohtani: withdrew citing left knee irritation (also missed Friday start but hit a leadoff HR); was the top vote-getter; 6th career All-Star selection
- Phillies: 6 All-Stars — Harper, Schwarber, Brandon Marsh (1st career), Cristopher Sánchez, Jhoan Duran (1st career), Jesús Luzardo (1st career, added July 7 as injury replacement)
- Zack Wheeler: NOT selected; publicly called snub "kind of BS"
- Justin Verlander: named "Legend Pick"; confirmed this is his final season
- Phillies lead MLB with 6 All-Stars (Dodgers and Braves each have 5)
- First All-Star Game in Philadelphia since 1996; 50th anniversary since 1976 Philly hosting
**Confirmed Facts (MEDIUM confidence):**
- Judge and Suárez had injury replacements named
- Paul Skenes also out

stories.title: Skubal Trade Watch — Tigers Hot, 23 Days to Deadline

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Tarik Skubal trade deadline update:

Tigers are 7-1 in their last 8. Best record in the AL since June 1. Only 4 games out of a Wild Card spot.

Skubal wants to stay. Tigers are reconsidering selling.

23 days until August 3. #MLB #TradeDeadline

article.headline: Tarik Skubal Trade Watch: Tigers Are Winning, and the August 3 Decision Just Got Complicated

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Skubal Trade Watch — 23 Days to Deadline

#### Image Concept 5A — Trade Deadline Countdown / FB + X

**Concept:** Countdown graphic. "23 DAYS" large type at top. "Tarik Skubal" name below. "August 3 Trade Deadline" footer. Background shows Tigers photo or Detroit branding. Urgency/tension design.

**Imagn Search Terms:**
- `Tarik Skubal Detroit Tigers`

**Canva Direction:** Tigers orange/black, dramatic countdown clock element, Skubal photo prominent, "Keep or Trade?" question overlay subtle, "MLB Trade Deadline | Aug 3" footer

research.facts:
Skubal Trade Watch — 23 Days to Deadline
**Source(s):**
- mlb.com/news/tigers-trade-candidates-for-2026-deadline
- clutchpoints.com/mlb/detroit-tigers/mlb-rumors-yankees-phillies-lead-latest-tarik-skubal-trade-update
- bleacherreport.com/articles/25442881-tarik-skubal-warns-tigers-amid-mlb-trade-rumors-contract-buzz-ahead-deadline-free-agency
- bleacherreport.com/articles/25443798-new-tarik-skubal-trade-rumors-reveal-which-team-seen-sleeper-tigers-star-mlb-deadline
- motorcitybengals.com/tarik-skubal-all-but-confirmed-he-s-staying-with-tigers-for-rest-of-2026-season
- heavy.com/sports/mlb/san-diego-padres/mlb-trade-rumors-tigers-keeping-skubal-blue-jays-selling-mason-miller-bo-bichette/
- cbssports.com/mlb/news/mlb-trade-rumors-tigers-tarik-skubal-yankees-diamondbacks-angels/
**Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Trade deadline: August 3, 2026 — 23 days from today (July 11)
- Skubal is a back-to-back AL Cy Young Award winner in his final year before free agency
- No long-term extension offer from Detroit; Skubal said "there won't be an offer until the end of the season"
- Tigers: best record in AL since June 1 (19-12), won 7 of last 8, now 4 games out of Wild Card
- Skubal quote: "We need to play better baseball or else, come the deadline, you give the front office an option to reassess where this team is."
- Skubal publicly advocates for Tigers to BUY, not sell
- Most-named frontrunners: Yankees, Phillies; Braves also cited as sleeper
- Asking price: one top-100 MLB prospect minimum + another team top-10 prospect
- Tigers reportedly shifting toward keeping Skubal as hot streak continues
- Expected Skubal free agency value: $400M+
